creative_brief.visual_style: High-end, minimalist aesthetic with a focus on clean lines and modern elegance. Imagery should highlight the product in use, with an emphasis on before-and-after visuals to showcase effectiveness. Use of lifestyle photography to appeal to aspirational living.
creative_brief.conceptual_technique: Digital-first, leveraging social media influencers and engaging video content to demonstrate product capabilities and benefits through tutorials and real-life transformations.
creative_brief.typography_style: Sans-serif fonts like Helvetica or Futura, which are modern and clean, reinforcing the brand's innovative and premium positioning. These fonts offer clarity and readability, important for educational content.
creative_brief.color_scheme: Neutral tones with accents of metallics such as silver or rose gold to convey luxury and innovation. This palette aligns with feelings of sophistication and advanced technology.
